name: Speaker Selection by Model
summary: An LLM picks the next-speaker in a multi-agent conversation based on shared context — a narrower-than-supervisor pattern where the model only routes, not plans.

raised_by.note: SelectorGroupChat uses an LLM for next-speaker selection.

evidence.title: AutoGen — SelectorGroupChat
evidence.quote: A team that selects the next speaker using a ChatCompletion model after each message

rejected_reason: Subsumed as the 'Selector (LLM-Chosen)' variant of group-chat-manager (authored 2026-05-20). GoF Variants slot is the right home: same problem, same forces, different selection tactic. Promoting to a first-class pattern would split a single intent across two entries.
